body:
Hi Shannon,

The template was pointing at a deprecated objective-data field after the update, which is why the note saved blank. I've remapped the SOAP template so prior measurements carry forward again. Please create a test note to confirm, then I'll mark this solved.

Best,
Jenna Holloway, MediTrack Support

Hi Monica,

The portal-to-day-sheet sync was running on a 4-hour batch instead of real time. I've switched your practice to live sync, so new portal bookings will land on the clinician day-sheet within a minute. Please confirm on your next booking.

Best,
Paul Devine, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

The PDF export was failing because a large embedded scan exceeded the export size cap. I've raised the cap for your practice and the chart now exports cleanly. The referral PDF for Southern Orthopedics should generate now.

Best,
Dana Whitfield, MediTrack Support

Hi Dr. Lawson,

CPT 97110 had been flagged by a payer-rule update on our side that required a paired modifier. I've corrected the rule so 97110 validates as before. Your held PT claims can be resubmitted now.

Best,
Greg Tanaka, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

You can add a custom intake field under Settings, Intake Templates, Add Field. I've gone ahead and added a Primary Sport and a Position dropdown to your intake template as a starting point. Let me know if you'd like to adjust the options.

Best,
Vikram Shah, MediTrack Support

Hi Monica,

The front-desk printer was missing from the EMR print-device list after a driver change. I've re-added it and set it as the default for visit summaries. Please try printing a test handout and let me know.

Best,
Priya Nadar, MediTrack Support

Hi Dr. Lawson,

I located the duplicate $40 copay posting on the ledger and reversed just the duplicate, leaving the original charge intact. The account balance is now correct. Going forward, the system will warn before posting an identical same-day payment.

Best,
Greg Tanaka, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

The evening timeouts trace to a session-pool limit being hit when several clinicians chart at once. I've raised your concurrent-session limit and tuned the idle timeout. Please let us know if anyone still gets logged out mid-note this week.

Best,
Paul Devine, MediTrack Support

Hi Monica,

The upload was interrupted, leaving a partial file. I've cleared the corrupted attachment from the chart so you can re-scan and upload the MRI report fresh. The new upload should open without issues.

Best,
Vikram Shah, MediTrack Support

Hi Dr. Lawson,

The payer ID for Blue Cross of Alabama in your clearinghouse mapping was outdated. I've updated it to the current payer ID, so resubmitted claims should clear. The three rejected claims can be rebilled now.

Best,
Greg Tanaka, MediTrack Support

Hi Monica,

For a non-prescribing provider, you can mark the NPI field as not applicable in the role setup, then the wizard will save. I've adjusted Shannon's role to full charting with e-prescribe disabled. Please verify he can log in and chart.

Best,
Dana Whitfield, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

The LEFS auto-scoring rule was disabled when the outcome-measure library was updated. I've re-enabled it on your knee template, so the total will calculate automatically again. Confirm on the next patient and I'll close this out.

Best,
Jenna Holloway, MediTrack Support

Hi Monica,

Our SMS gateway had a partial outage on your region; reminders queued but didn't send. Service is restored and I've re-sent today's 24-hour reminders. Patients should receive them shortly.

Best,
Paul Devine, MediTrack Support

Hi Monica,

The mobile app on the tablet was still on the prior version and out of sync with the new server release. Please remove and reinstall from the app store rather than updating in place, then sign in again. That should clear the sync error.

Best,
Priya Nadar, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

The two visits were checked in but not marked complete, so the end-of-day report excluded them. I've adjusted the report to count checked-in visits as well, and reconciled today's count. Let me know if the numbers line up now.

Best,
Vikram Shah, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

I've built a reusable ACL rehab flowsheet template under your practice library so you can pull it into any patient and edit per visit. I added the standard phases and exercises as a starting point. Happy to refine it with you on a call.

Best,
Jenna Holloway, MediTrack Support

Hi Monica,

Update the demographic record from the patient's chart header, Edit Demographics. The corrected name propagates to new statements automatically; I've also reissued the affected statement so it shows the right name. Past documents keep their original snapshot for the record.

Best,
Dana Whitfield, MediTrack Support

Hi Dr. Lawson,

The scheduled A/R aging report was failing because the delivery address list had a typo in the billing inbox. I've corrected it and re-sent the last two months' reports. The monthly delivery is back on schedule.

Best,
Greg Tanaka, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

The two clinicians were missing from a security group your identity provider maps to MediTrack, which blocked their SSO. I've coordinated the group mapping fix with your IT contact, and both can log in now.

Best,
Priya Nadar, MediTrack Support

Hi Shannon,

Patient-portal appointment replies were routing to an unmonitored queue. I've redirected portal messages to your front-desk inbox so Monica sees them, and moved the backlog over. Please confirm she can see them now.

Best,
Jenna Holloway, MediTrack Support

Hi Dr. Lawson,

The cash-pay adjustment code had an expiration date set on it from last quarter. I've extended it and re-enabled the code, so it applies at checkout again. Please run a test adjustment to confirm.

Best,
Dana Whitfield, MediTrack Support

Hi Dr. Lawson,

A promotional discount on your practice license expired this billing cycle, which accounts for the $30 difference. I've applied a one-time loyalty credit and outlined options to keep the rate lower going forward.

Best,
Paul Devine, MediTrack Support
Thanks, raising the session limit fixed the evening logouts and our clinicians can chart through the busy block now. Appreciate the quick turnaround.
